Please follow the guidelines below when contributing to this repository.

## Code Contribution
1. Fork this repository to your own account.
2. Clone your fork locally and create a new branch using the naming convention: *feature-name*.
3. Add your documentation as Markdown files inside the `content/storage-engine/projects/<your-project-name>/` directory. You can create multiple files and organize the documentation as needed within that folder.
4. Before pushing your changes, run npm run start in the terminal and open the provided link to verify that the Markdown is rendering correctly.
5. Commit your changes with clear messages.
6. Push the changes to your fork.
7. Open a Pull Request to the main branch.
